# Drilling Dynamics

**Summary**: The study of the forces and motions involved during the drilling process.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-saadeldin|SAADELDIN, 2023]] analyzed drilling dynamics to identify vibration patterns in horizontal sections.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-saadeldin|SAADELDIN, 2023]] The study focuses on the mechanical response of the drillstring to wellbore conditions.
